query:
SELECT pv.id, pv.variantCode, pb.grossWeight, pb.netWeight, pb.cbm 
FROM product_variants pv 
LEFT JOIN package_boxes pb ON pv.id = pb.variantId 
WHERE pv.variantCode IN ('DC-001-GRY-V034', 'DC-001-GRY-V035');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT pv.id, pv.variantCode, pb.grossWeight, pb.netWeight, pb.cbm
